race.description: The Donovan & Co Property Specialists Hcp (Bm68)
race.comment: The placement of PINK VIXEN (13) is interesting as her form has all been at a mile or less to date. Made late inroads without threatening over 1350m at Doomben last time. Should be competitive at good each-way odds from the inside draw with just 52.5kgs. DIVERSITY (9) scored a big win over the mile at Eagle Farm two back before failing in Listed company last start. Better placed this time so she can turn things around. HE'SGOTTHESAY (2) won't find this any harder than the last win at Ipswich which was impressive to the eye. Getting up in the weights but should run another big race. CANARA (7) made a rare visit to the winner's enclosure last start, leading all the way to easily take out a Class 1 over the mile at Eagle Farm. Small query at this trip but can run well again with the confidence restored. Stablemate MOSAMOUR (14) won a BM60 here at this trip two back so cannot be ruled out.
